hooks.name: lint-format-feedback
hooks.description: Auto-run ESLint + Prettier after file edits for immediate feedback
hooks.note: Creates feedback loop: edit → lint → Claude sees errors → fix

hooks.name: skill-evaluation-reminder
hooks.description: Remind to evaluate skills before starting implementation tasks
hooks.command:
echo '
🎯 Skills loaded. Evaluate which are relevant before implementing.
   Available: find-ui, generate-ui, ui-ux-pro-max
'

hooks.name: schedule-component-reminder
hooks.description: Remind to check PRD when schedule components are modified
hooks.command:
echo '
📅 Schedule component modified!
   Reference: docs/PRD.md Section 6.1 (Emploi Page)
   Check: Cell colors, interactions, modal content
'

hooks.name: planning-component-reminder
hooks.description: Remind to check PRD when planning matrix components are modified
hooks.command:
echo '
📊 Planning component modified!
   Reference: docs/PRD.md Section 6.2 (Plan Page)
   Check: Matrix layout, legend, week navigation
'

hooks.name: bilan-component-reminder
hooks.description: Remind to check PRD when bilan components are modified
hooks.command:
echo '
📈 Bilan component modified!
   Reference: docs/PRD.md Section 6.3 (Bilan Page)
   Check: Progress bars, color rules, sorting
'

hooks.name: types-change-reminder
hooks.description: Remind to update domain rules when types change
hooks.command:
echo '
📝 Types modified!
   Consider updating: .claude/rules/schedule-domain.md
   Ensure PRD Section 9 data models match
'

hooks.name: mock-data-reminder
hooks.description: Remind about data structure when mock data is edited
hooks.command:
echo '
📦 Mock data modified!
   Ensure structure matches types in src/types/index.ts
   Reference: PRD Section 9 for data models
'
